nasb.text: The crowds with one accord were giving attention to what was said by Philip, as they heard and saw the signs which he was performing.

esv.text: And the crowds with one accord paid attention to what was being said by Philip, when they heard him and saw the signs that he did.

cnv.text: 群眾聽了腓利所講的，看見他所行的神蹟，就同心聽從了他的話。

ccb.text: 城里的人耳闻目睹他所行的神迹，都聚精会神地听他讲道。

csbs.text: 当众人听见又看见腓利所行的神迹，就同心合意，专心听他所说的话。
